nodes.name: Chestnut-throated flycatcher
nodes.summary: Chestnut-throated flycatcher（Myiagra castaneigularis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chestnut-throated flycatcher。

nodes.name: Myiagra
nodes.summary: Myiagra（Myiagra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如Palau flycatcher、Pohnpei flycatcher、Chuuk flycatcher等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chestnut-throated flycatcher
nodes.summary: The chestnut-throated flycatcher (Myiagra castaneigularis) is a species of bird in the monarch-flycatcher family Monarchidae. The species is endemic to Fiji. Taxonomy and systematics In 2016, the chestnut-throated flycatcher was recognized as a new species after being split from the azure-crested flycatcher. Subspecies Two subspecies are recognized: M. c. castaneigularis - Layard, 1876: Found on Vanua Levu (northern Fiji) M. c. whitneyi - Mayr, 1933: Found on Viti Levu (western Fiji) References
